name: Honey-Mustard Dressing - II
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the honey, mustard, minced garlic, lemon juice, and vinegar.
2. Process until well mixed, about 1 minute.
3. With the motor running, add the canola (light) oil and sesame oil in a slow, steady stream.
4. Continue processing until the dressing is smooth with a creamy texture.
5. Store, covered, in refrigeration. The flavor will improve if made several hours before using.
6. If the dressing becomes too thick, whisk in a couple of tablespoons of water.
